objective: Modernize the PayHub payments settlement flow to support real-time settlement and reduce manual reconciliation.
pain_points: Manual reconciliation is slow and error-prone
target_process: Card and bank transfers are captured, validated, and settled in near real-time with automated reconciliation.
risks: Idempotency key reuse after 24h expiry can create duplicate transactions

assumptions.text: Transactions are capped at 10 million USD per instruction.

open_questions.question: What is the target settlement latency (e.g. seconds vs minutes)?
open_questions.why: Latency target is not stated in the sources.

open_questions.question: Which merchant segments are in scope for the first release?

citations.excerpt: Transactions are capped at 10 million USD per instruction.
PayHub processes card and bank transfers with real-time settlement.
